title: MCP client teardown warning-noise lane precheck
delta_summary: local teardown branch downgrades known anyio cancel-scope/different-task shutdown quirk from warning to debug

risk_signals.evidence: known anyio teardown quirk should not inflate warning/error channels
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay can reintroduce warning noise and hide actionable MCP failures

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/tests/test_mcp_registry_loader.py core/tests/test_tool_registry.py -k 'mcp' -q
uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k 'mcp or credentials' -q
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if known-quirk downgrade is covered and targeted MCP bundles stay green
